rationale: No conflict. The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts; Gov't Code §2054.116 governs Spanish-language website accessibility and is unrelated to exemption valuation thresholds.
quote: Each state agency shall make a reasonable effort to ensure that Spanish-speaking persons of limited English proficiency can meaningfully access state agency information online.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no overlap in subject matter.
